text: NVIDIA Corporation operates as a provider of graphics, compute, and networking solutions across the United States, Taiwan, China, and internationally [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The company generates revenue through two primary segments: Graphics and Compute & Networking [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The Graphics segment offers GeForce GPUs for gaming and PCs, GeForce NOW game streaming service, Quadro/NVIDIA RTX GPUs for enterprise workstation graphics, vGPU software for cloud-based visual computing, automotive platforms for infotainment systems, and Omniverse software for 3D designs [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The Compute & Networking segment provides Data Center platforms and systems for AI, HPC, and accelerated computing, Mellanox networking and interconnect solutions, automotive AI Cockpit, autonomous driving solutions, and NVIDIA AI Enterprise software [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. The company sells to original equipment manufacturers, system builders, cloud service providers, automotive manufacturers, and other ecosystem participants [812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. NVIDIA reported a gross margin of 56.93% and an operating margin of 15.66% for the fiscal year [fa1892bc-aa54-4657-b161-d3604764ec70, 3ffe9f64-65dd-443d-900d-ba16f3a72e7d].

citations.text_snippet: NVIDIA Corporation provides graphics, and compute and networking solutions in the United States, Taiwan, China, and internationally.
